originalTitle: Mali junta leader names himself defence minister after predecessor killed
title: Mali junta leader names himself defence minister after predecessor killed
content: Former Defence Minister Sadio Camara was killed in a massive offensive by combined jihadist and separatist forces.

originalTitle: New alliance shakes up Nigerian political landscape
title: New alliance shakes up Nigerian political landscape
content: Peter Obi and Rabiu Kwankwaso, who came third and fourth respectively in the last elections, switch parties.

originalTitle: BBC uncovers the Ugandan scammers abusing dogs to elicit donations from animal lovers
title: BBC uncovers the Ugandan scammers abusing dogs to elicit donations from animal lovers
content: Unwitting donors hand over money to save suffering animals but Ugandan con artists pocket the cash.

originalTitle: Gangland wars killing dozens of bystanders, report Swedish police
title: Gangland wars killing dozens of bystanders, report Swedish police
content: Deaths due to gang violence included people hit by stray bullets, cases of mistaken identity, and relatives of gang members.

originalTitle: Iran-US clash over alleged warship attack in Strait of Hormuz
title: Iran-US clash over alleged warship attack in Strait of Hormuz
content: Iran claims its navy forced a US warship to turn back from the Strait of Hormuz as Washington denies any clash.

originalTitle: Zambia delaying US deals over minerals and data demands
title: Zambia delaying US deals over minerals and data demands
content: Government calls for partnership not aid as it rejects US funds due to strategic autonomy concerns.

originalTitle: Two killed and many injured after car driven into crowd in German city of Leipzig
title: Two killed and many injured after car driven into crowd in German city of Leipzig
content: A 33-year-old German citizen was detained following the incident, the authorities say.

originalTitle: Three dead in suspected virus outbreak on Atlantic cruise ship
title: Three dead in suspected virus outbreak on Atlantic cruise ship
content: The operator of the MV Hondius ship says a Dutch husband and wife, as well as a German national, have died but the cause has not yet been established.

originalTitle: Former New York City mayor Rudy Giuliani recovering from pneumonia and 'now breathing on his own'
title: Former New York City mayor Rudy Giuliani recovering from pneumonia and 'now breathing on his own'
content: The ex-New York mayor 'remains in critical but stable condition', according to his spokesman.

originalTitle: What Champions League failure means for 'broken club' Chelsea
title: What Champions League failure means for 'broken club' Chelsea
content: After a sixth-straight league loss, Chelsea are almost certain to miss out on Champions League qualification - a bitter blow which is likely to have far‑reaching consequences.

originalTitle: Mourinho's Benfica still unbeaten - but miss out on title
title: Mourinho's Benfica still unbeaten - but miss out on title
content: Jose Mourinho's Benfica could go an entire season unbeaten - but it will not be enough to deliver the club a 39th Portuguese league title.

originalTitle: How De Zerbi brought life to sinking Spurs
title: How De Zerbi brought life to sinking Spurs
content: BBC Sport tactics expert Umir Irfan looks at how Roberto de Zerbi has revived Premier League strugglers Tottenham.
